No Poverty.reason: The course mentions '家庭中的理財管理' (financial management in the family), which tangentially relates to Target 1.4 concerning access to economic resources and financial services within a family context, though not directly addressing poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the syllabus relates to hunger, food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly covers emotional management, family care for mental health conditions (dementia, schizophrenia), and coping with loss (cancer, suicide), directly aligning with Target 3.4 on promoting mental health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is fundamentally about '家庭生活教育' (family life education), with explicit objectives to learn theories and design related programs, directly contributing to quality education and relevant skills.
